title: Hamilton (Southwest Central Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
## Hamilton Southwest Central Ontario

## Hamilton Southwest Central Ontario
Hamilton’s Francophone community is vibrant and multicultural. This liveliness is reflected in a wide range of French-language services offered by various Francophone organizations in the city. It’s close to many beautiful tourist attractions and offers a lot of employment opportunities.

## Watch: Living in Hamilton
Learn more about the community.
This video is also available in HD on YouTube where you can leave a comment, share it on your social network or embed it into your site.
Listen to the experience of two immigrants and their arrival in their new community.
“Immigration is not a project that just emerged like that. We wanted a country, a place where our son could build a good future and be successful in life.” – Rosa
An English transcription of the episode is available below.
Listen to more episodes of “My new home”.
